rulings.Case Title: ALEX YAKOVLEV VS. COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andotion For Order To Set Aide And Vacate Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 17, 2009, line 4, PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV Motion For Order To Set Aide And Vacate Dismissal. Motion to set aside dismissal is denied. Plaintiff failed to show good cause why his opposition to the demurrer was not a sufficient basis for him to present his arguments to the court or why he took so long to seek relief from the order sustaining the demurrer. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. KEITH BELT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 17, 2009, line 5, PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Motion to set aside default is granted. The policy of deciding cases on the merits requires the granting of the motion. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 17, 2009, line 16, DEFENDANT WILLIAM FAUST MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Motion to set aside default is granted. The policy of deciding cases on the merits requires the granting of the motion. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BRANDON KAPLAND et al VS. SARA FRAUSTO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 17, 2009, line 6, CROSS DEFENDANTS BRANDON KAPLAND, SUSAN CLARK, KENNETH KAPLAN MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. The special motion to strike is denied. Defendants have shown that their ninth cause of action is legally sufficient and supported by a prima facie showing. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BRANDON KAPLAND et al VS. SARA FRAUSTO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings To Deft'S First Amended Answer
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 17, 2009, line 6, PLAINTIFFS BRANDON KAPLAND, SUSAN CLARK, KENNETH KAPLAN Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Defendant's First Amended Answer. The motion for judgment on the pleadings with respect to defendants¿ answer is denied. The legal and factual sufficiency of the affirmative defenses should be addressed on a summary motion, not a non-evidentiary motion such as this. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT HARR et al VS. VICTORIA MEWS ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Demurrer To Pltfs' Second Cause Of Action For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 17, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT VICTORIA MEWS ASSOCIATION Demurrer To Plaintiffs Second Cause Of Action For Breach Of Fiduciary Duty. Demurrer to the second cause of action is sustained with ten days leave to amend to give the plaintiffs an opportunity, if they are able to do so, to allege facts establishing a fiduciary relationship and the breach of that relationship. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DOCMAGIC, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ELLIE MAE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 17, 2009, line 8, DEFENDANT ELLIE MAE INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
